name: Wavy Background
summary: A canvas-based wavy line background using 3D simplex noise to generate animated multi-color sine waves.
detailedDescription: Wavy Background renders animated wavy lines on canvas using 3D simplex noise for organic motion. The component draws 5 parallel waves across the canvas width, each with a different color from a configurable array (default: cyan, indigo, purple, pink, teal). Noise is sampled at x/800 position with offset per wave (0.3 * i) and time component (nt) that increments based on speed setting (slow: 0.001, fast: 0.002). Wave y-position is calculated as noise value * 100, centered at 50% canvas height. Lines are drawn with 50px width (configurable) and 0.5 opacity (configurable), with CSS blur filter applied (default 10px) for soft, glowing appearance. The canvas auto-resizes on window resize, maintaining full viewport coverage. Animation runs via requestAnimationFrame loop that clears canvas, fills with background color (default black), and redraws all waves each frame. The blur creates overlapping color blends where waves intersect, producing aurora-like effects. This component is ideal for hero backgrounds, music visualizations, or any context where flowing, colorful waves add atmospheric motion without overwhelming content.
purpose: Create flowing wavy line backgrounds with noise animation
Generate multi-color wave patterns with soft blur
Provide organic motion for atmospheric backgrounds
behavior: Samples 3D simplex noise for wave height calculation
Draws 5 parallel waves with different colors
Increments time component for continuous animation
Applies CSS blur filter for soft glow effect
Configurable speed, opacity, and wave width
visualCharacteristics: Soft blurred edges from CSS filter
recommendations: Best for premium landing page sections and hero compositions.
Use as a supporting atmospheric layer rather than the primary layout structure.
